blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,102 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 13".
